messages.content: scatterplot of bill depth and length but also filter to gentoo

input.dataSchema: {"name":"penguins","resources":[{"name":"penguins","type":"table","path":"penguins.csv","scheme":"file","format":"csv","mediatype":"text/csv","encoding":"utf-8","schema":{"fields":[{"name":"rowid","type":"string","description":"row id","udi:cardinality":281,"udi:unique":true,"udi:data_type":"nominal"},{"name":"species","type":"string","description":"species name of the penguin","udi:cardinality":4,"udi:unique":false,"udi:data_type":"nominal"},{"name":"island","type":"string","description":"island penguin lives on","udi:cardinality":4,"udi:unique":false,"udi:data_type":"nominal"},{"name":"sex","type":"string","description":"sex  of the penguin","udi:cardinality":2,"udi:unique":false,"udi:data_type":"nominal"},{"name":"bill_length_mm","type":"number","description":"bill length of the penguin in millimeters","udi:cardinality":330,"udi:unique":false,"udi:data_type":"quantitative"},{"name":"bill_depth_mm","type":"number","description":"bill depth of the penguin in millimeters","udi:cardinality":330,"udi:unique":false,"udi:data_type":"quantitative"},{"name":"flipper_length_mm","type":"number","description":"flipper length of the penguin in millimeters","udi:cardinality":330,"udi:unique":false,"udi:data_type":"quantitative"},{"name":"body_mass_g","type":"number","description":"body mass of the penguin in grams","udi:cardinality":330,"udi:unique":false,"udi:data_type":"quantitative"},{"name":"year","type":"number","description":"the year the penguin was recorded","udi:cardinality":330,"udi:unique":false,"udi:data_type":"quantitative"}],"primaryKey":["rowid"],"foreignKeys":[]},"udi:row_count":344,"udi:column_count":9}],"udi:name":"penguins","udi:path":"./data/penguins/"}
input.dataDomains: [{"entity":"penguins","field":"rowid","type":"interval","fieldDescription":"row id","domain":{"min":1,"max":344}},{"entity":"penguins","field":"species","type":"point","fieldDescription":"species name of the penguin","domain":{"values":["Adelie","Gentoo","Chinstrap"]}},{"entity":"penguins","field":"island","type":"point","fieldDescription":"island penguin lives on","domain":{"values":["Torgersen","Biscoe","Dream"]}},{"entity":"penguins","field":"bill_length_mm","type":"interval","fieldDescription":"bill length of the penguin in millimeters","domain":{"min":32.1,"max":59.6}},{"entity":"penguins","field":"bill_depth_mm","type":"interval","fieldDescription":"bill depth of the penguin in millimeters","domain":{"min":13.1,"max":21.5}},{"entity":"penguins","field":"flipper_length_mm","type":"interval","fieldDescription":"flipper length of the penguin in millimeters","domain":{"min":172,"max":231}},{"entity":"penguins","field":"body_mass_g","type":"interval","fieldDescription":"body mass of the penguin in grams","domain":{"min":2700,"max":6300}},{"entity":"penguins","field":"sex","type":"point","fieldDescription":"sex  of the penguin","domain":{"values":["male","female",null]}},{"entity":"penguins","field":"year","type":"interval","fieldDescription":"the year the penguin was recorded","domain":{"min":2007,"max":2009}}]
